mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS object_id, o.suite_code, o.object_code, o.object_name, o.config_key, v.publish_version AS published_object_version, b.id AS binding_id, b.binding_key, b.binding_config FROM ai_business_object o INNER JOIN ai_business_binding b ON b.tenant_id = o.tenant_id AND b.target_type = 'OBJECT' AND b.target_id = o.id AND b.target_code = o.object_code AND b.binding_type = 'FLOW' AND b.status = 1 INNER JOIN ai_business_object_design_version v ON v.tenant_id = o.tenant_id AND v.object_id = o.id AND v.suite_code = o.suite_code AND v.object_code = o.object_code AND v.publish_version = o.last_publish_version AND v.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' WHERE o.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND o.suite_code = #{suiteCode} AND o.object_code = #{objectCode} AND o.status = 1 AND o.design_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND o.last_publish_version IS NOT NULL AND o.last_publish_version > 0 AND o.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.binding_key IS NULL OR b.binding_key = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN b.binding_config IS NULL OR b.binding_config = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, b.sort_order ASC, b.update_time DESC, b.id DESC LIMIT 1
